transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Thanks for calling Brightpath Health Navigation, this is Ava. How can I help you today?

transcript.speaker: patient
transcript.text: Hi, I need a refill on my blood pressure medication. It's lisinopril.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Sure, I can help with that. Can I get your full name and date of birth to pull up your file?

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Thanks, Marcus. I see your lisinopril 10 milligrams, last filled at Cedar Grove Pharmacy about three weeks ago. Is that the correct pharmacy?

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Great. I'll send the refill request to Dr. Owens for approval and forward it to Cedar Grove once confirmed. It should be ready within a couple hours.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: You're welcome. Is there anything else I can help you with today?

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Take care, Marcus, and have a great rest of your day.
